610 DLYS_DSCHRG_CD DLYS_DSCHRG_CD Other: Dialysis (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving dialysis. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
611 HMDYLS_ADMSN_CD HMDYLS_ADMSN_CD Other: Hemodialysis (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving hemodialysis. 0 = No
